channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Anthropic CEO Dario Amodei pens a smart look at our AI future
item.description: Welcome to AI Decoded, Fast Company’s weekly newsletter that breaks down the most important news in the world of AI. You can sign up to receive this newsletter every week here.
item.dc:creator: Mark Sullivan, Fast Company

item.title: Instagram Rolls Out New Safety Features to Combat Sextortion Schemes
item.description: Instagram introduces new safety features to prevent sextortion schemes, protecting users, especially teenagers, from online harm and educating teens about the dangers of sextortion scams.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, NewsNation

item.title: Boeing competitor Airbus to cut up to 2,500 jobs in space, defense sector
item.description: Boeing competitor Airbus on Wednesday announced it would take steps to cut 2,500 jobs in the company’s defense and space division through the middle of 2026.
item.dc:creator: Sarah Fortinsky, The Hill

item.title: Navy logistics modernization effort ready to take next step
item.description: Jeff Baur, the product director for logistics IT for the Navy’s PEO-MLB, said ensuring the new platform meets the users’ needs is a top priority. The post Navy logistics modernization effort ready to take next step first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Jason Miller, Federal News Network

item.title: Easy ways to make calls when vision is a challenge
item.description: For those with visual challenges, there are a number of voice-dialing apps and features to help make phone calls without having to see numbers.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Data center provider fakes Tier 4 data center certificate to bag $11M SEC deal
item.description: Deepak Jain, CEO of a Maryland-based IT services firm, has been indicted for fraud and making false statements after allegedly falsifying a Tier 4 data center certification to secure a $10.7 million contract with the US Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC).
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: The Cybersecurity Association of China Sparks Concerns Over Intel's National Security Risks
item.description: China's cybersecurity association urges review of Intel products due to national security concerns, potentially affecting the semiconductor industry and US-China trade tensions
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Foot Locker hace de la tecnología una capacidad empresarial
item.description: El comercio minorista es dinámico, está en constante cambio y genera una gran cantidad de datos; y a través de la comercialización, las transacciones en tienda, la cadena de suministro, la tecnología digital y la fijación de precios, las oportunidades para aprovechar los datos son infinitas.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Hacked robo-vacuums chase owners, yell slurs
item.description: Some customers report the tiny tech tools chased them around their homes and barraged them with profanities.
item.dc:creator: Anna Kutz, NewsNation

item.title: Elon Musk loaded $75 million into his pro-Trump super PAC in 3 months
item.description: Elon Musk has personally contributed at least $75 million to his pro-Trump America PAC since July as he pushes for the former president to return to the White House, according to campaign finance records filed Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Taylor Giorno, The Hill

item.title: Inside SSA’s plan to become the ‘most accessible agency’ in government
item.description: Betsy Beaumon, SSA’s chief transformation officer, says the is reinventing service delivery to keep up with a growing volume of customers. The post Inside SSA’s plan to become the ‘most accessible agency’ in government first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Jory Heckman, Federal News Network

item.title: NCSC seeks to expand counterintelligence outreach
item.description: A new national strategy warns that counterintelligence pros have to work more closely with other agencies and the private sector to address threats. The post NCSC seeks to expand counterintelligence outreach first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Justin Doubleday, Federal News Network

item.title: Microsoft settles video gamers' lawsuit over Activision takeover
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — Microsoft Corp. has settled a lawsuit from a group of gamers who sued to try to stop the company from buying video game publisher Activision Blizzard for $69 billion last year. Terms of the settlement were not disclosed.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Mexico says foreign firms have pledged $20 billion in investments, but many are old or uncertain
item.description: MEXICO CITY (AP) — Mexican officials announced Tuesday what they claimed was $20 billion in new foreign direct investment in Mexico, but much of that was neither new, nor completely certain.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Russia, China collaborating with criminal networks in cyberattacks against adversaries: Microsoft
item.description: Russia, China and Iran are increasingly collaborating with cybercrime networks to launch a variety of attacks against their adversaries, including the U.S., Microsoft said in a Tuesday report.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, The Hill

item.title: Countries that have cashed in on their top-level domain names
item.description: LONDON (AP) — Anguilla is raking in extra revenue from registration fees for its .ai web domain thanks to the artificial intelligence boom, but it's not the only place cashing in on demand for websites with distinctive address endings.
item.dc:creator: KELVIN CHAN, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Cato Networks extends SASE platform with digital experience monitoring
item.description: Cato Networks today introduced digital experience monitoring (DEM) capabilities that will augment the company’s cloud SASE platform with application traffic and network performance data that IT operations teams need to optimize end-user experiences.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: SUSE Edge upgrade targets Kubernetes and Linux at the edge
item.description: Open source and Linux platform vendor SUSE is looking to help organizations solve some of the complexity and challenges of edge computing with the company’s SUSE Edge 3.1 release, announced today.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Google bets on nuclear power to drive AI expansion
item.description: Google has signed its first corporate deal to purchase power from multiple small modular reactors (SMRs) to meet the energy needs of its AI systems, marking a key step as AI companies shift toward nuclear power.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Hide and lock your apps on your iPhone with iOS 18
item.description: Tech expert Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson explores the iOS 18’s new features to hide and lock apps for better privacy and organization.
item.dc:creator: Fox News
